name: Caramel Pecan Pie- Dkp
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle half a cup of sugar in a heavy skillet; place over medium heat. Cook, stirring constantly, until the sugar melts and forms a light golden brown syrup.
2. Combine the remaining half cup of sugar, cornstarch, and salt in a heavy saucepan. Gradually stir in milk. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until thickened and bubbly.
3. Beat egg yolks. Gradually stir about one-fourth of the hot mixture into the yolks, then add to the remaining hot mixture, stirring constantly. Cook, stirring constantly, until thickened.
4. Stir in the caramelized sugar; cook, stirring constantly, until the sugar melts. Remove from heat and stir in butter, vanilla, and chopped pecans.
5. Pour filling into a baked pastry shell.
6. Beat egg whites (at room temperature) with cream of tartar until foamy. Gradually add 3 tablespoons sugar, 1 tablespoon at a time, beating until stiff peaks form.
7. Spread meringue over the hot filling, sealing to the edge of the pastry. Bake at 400°F for 8 to 10 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool completely before serving.
Yield: One 9-inch pie.
